description:
ReplAI is your personal relationship communication coach. Share a screenshot of any text conversation and get instant, emotionally intelligent reply suggestions — all processed entirely on your device.

HOW IT WORKS
1. Share a screenshot of your conversation
2. AI analyzes the emotional dynamics on-device
3. Choose from 6 tone-matched reply options
4. Tap to copy and paste into any messaging app

6 COMMUNICATION STYLES
• Calm — De-escalate tension with composure
• Assertive — Set clear boundaries with confidence
• Vulnerable — Open up with honest emotional expression
• Humorous — Lighten the mood naturally
• Dominant — Take charge of the conversation
• Submissive — Respond with empathy and understanding

COMPLETE PRIVACY
Everything happens on your iPhone. Your screenshots and conversations never leave your device — no servers, no cloud, no data collection. ReplAI uses Apple's on-device intelligence for both text recognition and reply generation.

FREE TO TRY
Get 3 free analyses per week. Upgrade to ReplAI Premium for unlimited analyses:
• Weekly: $4.99/week
• Monthly: $18.99/month
• Yearly: $87.99/year (best value — save 66%)

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your Apple ID account settings.

Privacy Policy: https://huseyinataseven.github.io/replai/privacy
Terms of Use: https://huseyinataseven.github.io/replai/terms
promotionalText: Never struggle with what to text back. Get 6 emotionally intelligent reply suggestions in seconds — 100% on-device, 100% private.
